explanation: The diagram shows direct communication between various client applications (Customer Management Frontend, Customer Self-Service Frontend, Policy Management Frontend, Risk Management Client) and internal microservices (Customer Management Backend, Customer Self-Service Backend, Policy Management Backend, Risk Management Server, Customer Core, Spring Boot Admin). There is no central API Gateway to handle routing, authentication, rate limiting, or other cross-cutting concerns. This indicates a likely presence of the 'No API Gateway' anti-pattern.
